# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 \
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    python3.10 \
    python3-pip \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    vim \
    nano \
    build-essential \
    libssl-dev \
    libffi-dev \
    python3-dev \
    ca-certificates \
    gnupg \
    lsb-release \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN groupadd -r appuser -g 1000 && \
    useradd -r -u 1000 -g appuser -m -s /bin/bash appuser && \
    mkdir -p /app /data && \
    chown -R appuser:appuser /app /data

WORKDIR /app

RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

COPY --chown=appuser:appuser requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

COPY --chown=appuser:appuser . .

RUN find /app -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \; && \
    find /app -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \; && \
    chmod +x /app/*.py 2>/dev/null || true

USER appuser

VOLUME ["/data"]

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD python3 -c "import sys; sys.exit(0)" || exit 1

CMD ["python3", "app.py"]
